positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and gently floating geometric lily pads. The primary subject is a stylized, elegant stag silhouette standing amidst the luminous foliage. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, utilizing deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and vibrant neon cyan accents against a dark, saturated midnight background. Clean outlines, maximal contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, highly detailed ink drawing quality, perfect for apparel transfer print, minimal grunge, flat vector illustration feel, ultra-HD, symmetrical composition, rule of thirds applied to the surrounding elements.
